notes: Skull scaling increased (5% → 7%). Golem scaling reduced early (before 5 minutes) and increased significantly in the late game.

heroes.name: Arthas
notes: Base health and Death Coil healing increased.
Frostmourne Hungers — lower damage per quest stack on Basic Attacks, higher damage bonus on charged attacks.
Frost Presence: line damage can hit in both the line and the final area; Death Coil slow from the talent lasts longer.
Icebound Fortitude clears Slows and Roots on use.
Path of Frost sets minimum Movement Speed to 140% instead of flat +40% Movement Speed.

heroes.name: Chen
notes: Flying Kick damage up.
Fortifying Brew — slightly faster interrupt window, more shield per tick.
Accumulating Flame: initial hit grants a quest stack; higher stack thresholds (25/80).

heroes.name: Deathwing
notes: Molten Flame damage per tick increased.
Destroyer's Rampage duration reduced (6s → 4s).

heroes.name: Gazlowe
notes: Rock-It! Turret damage up.
One Man Wrecking Crew damage bonus increased (60% → 75%).

heroes.name: Mal'Ganis
notes: Will of Tichondrius — lower damage per stack, easier quest unlock.
Winged Guard stacks slightly more often.
Deep Sleep move-speed bonus up.
Wrath of Nathreza transfers more damage to Mal'Ganis.

heroes.name: Murky
notes: March of the Murlocs cooldown reduced (100s → 90s).
Triglav Protector Particle Cannon charge no longer causes other players' cursors to highlight incorrectly.

heroes.name: Arthas
notes: Rime and Remorseless Winter healing now display correctly in Death Recap.

heroes.name: Chen
notes: Breath of Fire again deals impact damage.

heroes.name: Muradin
notes: Storm Bolt / Perfect Storm quest UI, Mana refund, cooldown, and Self Healing score fixes.

heroes.name: Rexxar
notes: Misha respawns correctly when her respawn timer finishes.

heroes.name: Zagara
notes: Infest displays as a Quest Bonus where applicable (Tychus / Zagara).

heroes.name: Tyrande
notes: Lunar Blaze quest progress fixes (non-standard death states, non-Hero kills, progression indicator).
